inputs.definitionBody:
STRUCT(
      `undefined.functions.daml_record_numeric`(tr_json, [0]) AS appRewardAmount,
      `undefined.functions.daml_record_numeric`(tr_json, [1]) AS validatorRewardAmount,
      `undefined.functions.daml_record_numeric`(tr_json, [2]) AS svRewardAmount,
      IFNULL(
        PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(tr_json,
          `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([11], 'optional_numeric'))), 0) AS unclaimedActivityRecordAmount -- (was added only in Splice 0.4.4)
    )

SELECT
      as_of_record_time,
      migration_id,
      `undefined.functions.locked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as locked,
      `undefined.functions.unlocked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as unlocked,
      `undefined.functions.locked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) + `undefined.functions.unlocked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as current_supply_total,
      `undefined.functions.unminted`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as unminted,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).appRewardAmount
          AS daily_mint_app_rewards,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).validatorRewardAmount
          AS daily_mint_validator_rewards,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time, migration_id).svRewardAmount
          AS daily_mint_sv_rewards,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).unclaimedActivityRecordAmount
          AS daily_mint_unclaimed_activity_records,
      IFNULL(
        `undefined.functions.burned`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id),
        0) AS daily_burn,
      `undefined.functions.num_amulet_holders`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as num_amulet_holders,
      `undefined.functions.num_active_validators`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as num_active_validators,
      IFNULL(`undefined.functions.average_tps`(as_of_record_time, migration_id), 0.0) as average_tps,
      IFNULL(`undefined.functions.peak_tps`(as_of_record_time, migration_id), 0.0) as peak_tps,
      `undefined.functions.coin_price`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).minPrice
          AS daily_min_coin_price,
      `undefined.functions.coin_price`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).maxPrice
          AS daily_max_coin_price,
      `undefined.functions.coin_price`(
            TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR),
            `undefined.functions.migration_id_at_time`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR)),
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).avgPrice
          AS daily_avg_coin_price

view.query:
SELECT
      *,
      DATE_SUB(DATE(computed.as_of_record_time), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS up_to_date
    FROM
        `undefined.dashboards.dashboards-data` computed
        JOIN `undefined.dashboards.monthly_burn` monthly_burn
          ON computed.as_of_record_time = monthly_burn.monthly_as_of_record_time
        JOIN `undefined.dashboards.daily_unminted` daily_unminted
          ON computed.as_of_record_time = daily_unminted.daily_as_of_record_time

inputs.definitionBody:
-- Generate all days since genesis (first record time in the scan dataset) until today.
    SELECT
      TIMESTAMP(day) as as_of_record_time
    FROM
      UNNEST(
        GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(
          -- DATE(
          --   TIMESTAMP_MICROS((SELECT MIN(record_time) FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises`))
          --),
          -- TODO(DACH-NY/canton-network-internal#1461): for now we compute only last 60 days until we confirm costs, and will
          -- backfill to genesis later.
          DATE(TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)),
          CURRENT_DATE
        )
      ) as day

SELECT
      as_of_record_time,
      migration_id,
      `undefined.functions.locked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as locked,
      `undefined.functions.unlocked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as unlocked,
      `undefined.functions.locked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) + `undefined.functions.unlocked`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as current_supply_total,
      `undefined.functions.unminted`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as unminted,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            NULL,
            NULL,
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).appRewardAmount
          AS total_mint_app_rewards,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            NULL,
            NULL,
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).validatorRewardAmount
          AS total_mint_validator_rewards,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            NULL,
            NULL,
            as_of_record_time, migration_id).svRewardAmount
          AS total_mint_sv_rewards,
      `undefined.functions.minted`(
            NULL,
            NULL,
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id).unclaimedActivityRecordAmount
          AS total_mint_unclaimed_activity_records,
      IFNULL(
        `undefined.functions.burned`(
            NULL,
            NULL,
            as_of_record_time,
            migration_id),
        0) AS total_burn,
      `undefined.functions.num_amulet_holders`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as num_amulet_holders,
      `undefined.functions.num_active_validators`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as num_active_validators,
      `undefined.functions.latest_round`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) as latest_round

SELECT DISTINCT
        JSON_VALUE(create_arguments, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([0], 'party')) as validator_operator_party,
        TIMESTAMP_MICROS(MAX(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY JSON_VALUE(create_arguments, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([0], 'party')))) AS latest_validator_license,
        TIMESTAMP_MICROS(MIN(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY JSON_VALUE(create_arguments, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([0], 'party')))) AS first_validator_license
      FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
      WHERE c.package_name = "splice-amulet"
        AND c.template_id_module_name = "Splice.ValidatorLicense"
        AND c.template_id_entity_name = "ValidatorLicense"
        AND `undefined.functions.up_to_time`(as_of_record_time, migration_id, c.record_time, c.migration_id)

SELECT
      JSON_VALUE(create_arguments, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1], 'party')) as owner,
      TIMESTAMP_MICROS(created_at) as latest_amulet_created
      FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
      WHERE c.package_name = "splice-amulet"
        AND c.template_id_module_name = "Splice.Amulet"
        AND c.template_id_entity_name = "Amulet"
        AND `undefined.functions.up_to_time`(as_of_record_time, migration_id, c.record_time, c.migration_id)
      QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY owner ORDER BY created_at DESC) = 1

(SELECT SUM(fees)
      FROM ((
                SELECT
                    SUM(`undefined.functions.result_burn`(e.choice,
                                              e.result)) fees
                FROM
                    `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises` e
                WHERE
                    ((e.choice IN ('AmuletRules_BuyMemberTraffic',
                                  'AmuletRules_Transfer',
                                  'AmuletRules_CreateTransferPreapproval',
                                  'AmuletRules_CreateExternalPartySetupProposal')
                        AND e.template_id_entity_name = 'AmuletRules')
                        OR (e.choice = 'TransferPreapproval_Renew'
                            AND e.template_id_entity_name = 'TransferPreapproval'))
                  AND e.template_id_module_name = 'Splice.AmuletRules'
                  AND `undefined.functions.in_time_window`(
                          start_record_time, start_migration_id,
                          up_to_record_time, up_to_migration_id,
                          e.record_time, e.migration_id))
            UNION ALL (-- Purchasing ANS Entries
                SELECT
                    SUM(PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(c.create_arguments, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([2, 0], 'numeric')))) fees -- .amount.initialAmount
                FROM
                    `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises` e,
                    `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
                WHERE
                    ((e.choice = 'SubscriptionInitialPayment_Collect'
                        AND e.template_id_entity_name = 'SubscriptionInitialPayment'
                        AND c.contract_id = JSON_VALUE(e.result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([2], 'contractId'))) -- .amulet
                        OR (e.choice = 'SubscriptionPayment_Collect'
                            AND e.template_id_entity_name = 'SubscriptionPayment'
                            AND c.contract_id = JSON_VALUE(e.result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1], 'contractId')))) -- .amulet
                  AND e.template_id_module_name = 'Splice.Wallet.Subscriptions'
                  AND c.template_id_module_name = 'Splice.Amulet'
                  AND c.template_id_entity_name = 'Amulet'
                  AND `undefined.functions.in_time_window`(
                          start_record_time, start_migration_id,
                          up_to_record_time, up_to_migration_id,
                          e.record_time, e.migration_id)
                  AND c.record_time != -62135596800000000)))

CASE choice
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_CreateExternalPartySetupProposal'
        -- .transferResult.summary
        THEN JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([3, 1], 'record'))
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_CreateTransferPreapproval'
        -- .transferResult.summary
        THEN JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 1], 'record'))
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_BuyMemberTraffic'
        -- .summary
        THEN JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1], 'record'))
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_Transfer'
        -- .summary
        THEN JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1], 'record'))
      WHEN 'TransferPreapproval_Renew'
        -- .transferResult.summary
        THEN JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 1], 'record'))
      ELSE ERROR('no TransferSummary for this choice: ' || choice)
    END

(SELECT AS
      STRUCT
        MIN(`undefined.functions.daml_record_numeric`(c.create_arguments, [2])),
        MAX(`undefined.functions.daml_record_numeric`(c.create_arguments, [2])),
        AVG(`undefined.functions.daml_record_numeric`(c.create_arguments, [2]))
    FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
      WHERE template_id_entity_name = 'SummarizingMiningRound'
      AND c.template_id_module_name = 'Splice.Round'
      AND package_name = 'splice-amulet'
      AND `undefined.functions.in_time_window`(
        start_record_time, start_migration_id,
        up_to_record_time, up_to_migration_id,
        c.record_time, c.migration_id
    ))

view.query:
SELECT
        as_of_record_time as daily_as_of_record_time,
        unminted - LAG(unminted) OVER (
            ORDER BY as_of_record_time
        ) AS daily_unminted
    FROM
        `undefined.dashboards.dashboards-data`

inputs.definitionBody:
CASE selector
        WHEN 'optional_numeric' THEN '.optional.value.numeric'
        WHEN 'numeric' THEN '.numeric'
        WHEN 'contractId' THEN '.contractId'
        WHEN 'list' THEN '.list.elements'
        WHEN 'party' THEN '.party'
        WHEN 'int64' THEN '.int64'
        -- we treat records just like outer layer;
        -- see how paths start with '$.record'
        WHEN 'record' THEN ''
        ELSE ERROR('Unknown Daml primitive case: ' || selector)
      END

PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(daml_record,
        `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`(path, 'numeric')))

-- Return a full JSON path to a nested Daml record field.  A field lookup like
    -- `.x.y.z` can be accessed as follows:
    -- 1. Find the record that defines `x`.
    -- 2. Find the 0-based index of `x` in that record, in order of its fields.
    --    For example, consider it the fourth field (index 3) for this example.
    -- 3. Next, move to the type of the `x` field, which should have `y`.
    -- 4. Repeat step (2) for `y` to find the next index.
    --    In this example, suppose it is the first field (index 0).
    -- 5. Repeat steps (3) and (4) for `z`.
    --    In this example, suppose it is the second field (index 1).
    -- 6. The first argument here is `[3, 0, 1]` for this example.
    -- 7. Finally, check the type of `z`; see `daml_prim_path` for a matching
    --    selector to pass here.

    CONCAT('$',
          -- you cannot use SELECT in a BigQuery JSONPath, even indirectly
          CASE ARRAY_LENGTH(field_indices)
            WHEN 0 THEN ''
            WHEN 1 THEN CONCAT('.record.fields[', CAST(field_indices[0] AS STRING), '].value')
            WHEN 2 THEN CONCAT('.record.fields[', CAST(field_indices[0] AS STRING), '].value',
                              '.record.fields[', CAST(field_indices[1] AS STRING), '].value')
            WHEN 3 THEN CONCAT('.record.fields[', CAST(field_indices[0] AS STRING), '].value',
                              '.record.fields[', CAST(field_indices[1] AS STRING), '].value',
                              '.record.fields[', CAST(field_indices[2] AS STRING), '].value')
            ELSE ERROR('Unsupported number of field indices: ' || ARRAY_LENGTH(field_indices))
          END,
          `undefined.functions.daml_prim_path`(prim_selector))

-- Find all days since genesis for which we do not have a stats entry at all, or its lacking some fields.
    SELECT as_of_record_time
      FROM `undefined.dashboards.all_days_since_genesis`()
      EXCEPT DISTINCT
        SELECT
          as_of_record_time
          FROM `undefined.dashboards.dashboards-data`
          WHERE
            locked IS NOT NULL
            AND unlocked IS NOT NULL
            AND current_supply_total IS NOT NULL
            AND unminted IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_mint_app_rewards IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_mint_validator_rewards IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_mint_sv_rewards IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_mint_unclaimed_activity_records IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_burn IS NOT NULL
            AND num_amulet_holders IS NOT NULL
            AND num_active_validators IS NOT NULL
            AND average_tps IS NOT NULL
            AND peak_tps IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_min_coin_price IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_max_coin_price IS NOT NULL
            AND daily_avg_coin_price IS NOT NULL

CASE
      WHEN start_record_time IS NULL AND start_migration_id IS NULL THEN
        (migration_id < up_to_migration_id
            OR (migration_id = up_to_migration_id
              AND record_time <= UNIX_MICROS(up_to_record_time)))
          AND record_time != -62135596800000000
      WHEN start_record_time IS NOT NULL AND start_migration_id IS NOT NULL THEN
        (migration_id > start_migration_id
            OR (migration_id = start_migration_id
              AND record_time > UNIX_MICROS(start_record_time)))
          AND (migration_id < up_to_migration_id
            OR (migration_id = up_to_migration_id
              AND record_time <= UNIX_MICROS(up_to_record_time)))
          AND record_time != -62135596800000000
      ELSE ERROR('in_time_window: start_record_time and start_migration_id must be both NULL or both NOT NULL')
    END
PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%FT%TZ', iso8601_string)

(SELECT
        CAST(JSON_VALUE(c.create_arguments, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1,0], 'int64')) AS INT64)
      FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
          WHERE template_id_entity_name = 'SummarizingMiningRound'
          AND c.template_id_module_name = 'Splice.Round'
          AND package_name = 'splice-amulet'
          AND `undefined.functions.up_to_time`(
            as_of_record_time, migration_id,
            c.record_time, c.migration_id)
          ORDER BY c.record_time DESC LIMIT 1)

`undefined.functions.sum_bignumeric_acs`(
      -- (LockedAmulet) .amulet.amount.initialAmount
      [0, 2, 0],
      'Splice.Amulet',
      'LockedAmulet',
      as_of_record_time,
      migration_id)

-- Given a record time, find the latest migration ID that was active at that time. Takes the lowest ID that has updates
    -- after the given time, therefore if the timestamp is during a migration, it will return the older migration ID.
    -- If no updates exist after the given time, returns the migration id of the last update.
    IFNULL
    (
      -- Try to find the lowest migration ID that has updates after the given time.
      (SELECT
        MIN(migration_id)
      FROM
        ((SELECT record_time, migration_id FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates`) UNION ALL
         (SELECT record_time, migration_id FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises`))
      WHERE record_time > UNIX_MICROS(as_of_record_time)),
      -- If none exists, return the migration ID of the last update.
      (SELECT migration_id FROM
        (
          (SELECT record_time, migration_id FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates`) UNION ALL
          (SELECT record_time, migration_id FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises`)
        ) ORDER BY record_time DESC LIMIT 1)
    )

(SELECT
        STRUCT(
          COALESCE(SUM(`undefined.functions.TransferSummary_minted`(
                    `undefined.functions.choice_result_TransferSummary`(e.choice, e.result)).appRewardAmount),
                  0) AS appRewardAmount,
          COALESCE(SUM(`undefined.functions.TransferSummary_minted`(
                    `undefined.functions.choice_result_TransferSummary`(e.choice, e.result)).validatorRewardAmount),
                  0) AS validatorRewardAmount,
          COALESCE(SUM(`undefined.functions.TransferSummary_minted`(
                    `undefined.functions.choice_result_TransferSummary`(e.choice, e.result)).svRewardAmount),
                  0) AS svRewardAmount,
          COALESCE(SUM(`undefined.functions.TransferSummary_minted`(
                    `undefined.functions.choice_result_TransferSummary`(e.choice, e.result)).unclaimedActivityRecordAmount),
                  0) AS unclaimedActivityRecordAmount
        )
      FROM
        `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises` e
      WHERE
        -- all the choices that can take coupons as input, and thus mint amulets based on them.
        ((e.choice IN ('AmuletRules_BuyMemberTraffic',
                      'AmuletRules_Transfer',
                      'AmuletRules_CreateTransferPreapproval',
                      'AmuletRules_CreateExternalPartySetupProposal')
            AND e.template_id_entity_name = 'AmuletRules')
            OR (e.choice = 'TransferPreapproval_Renew'
                AND e.template_id_entity_name = 'TransferPreapproval'))
        AND e.template_id_module_name = 'Splice.AmuletRules'
        AND `undefined.functions.in_time_window`(
              start_record_time, start_migration_id,
              up_to_record_time, up_to_migration_id,
              e.record_time, e.migration_id))

inputs.displayName: Service Account for Bulk-Storage Bucket Read/Write Access
Service Account for Bulk-Storage Bucket Read/Write Access

view.query:
SELECT
        as_of_record_time as monthly_as_of_record_time,
        SUM(daily_burn) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_record_time ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as monthly_burn,
        SUM(daily_burn * daily_avg_coin_price) OVER (ORDER BY as_of_record_time ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as monthly_burn_usd
      FROM
        `undefined.dashboards.dashboards-data`

inputs.definitionBody:
(SELECT COUNT(*) as num_active_validators
      FROM `undefined.functions.all_validators`(as_of_record_time, migration_id) v
      WHERE v.latest_validator_license > TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 24 HOUR))
(SELECT COUNT(*) as num_amulet_holders FROM `undefined.functions.amulet_holders`(as_of_record_time, migration_id))

-- All update IDs over a period of 24 hours. Since the data might be up to 4 hours stale, we take a window of 4-28 hours ago.
    SELECT DISTINCT(update_id), record_time FROM (
        SELECT
          update_id,
          record_time
        FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises` e
        WHERE `undefined.functions.in_time_window`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 28 HOUR), migration_id, TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 4 HOUR), migration_id, e.record_time, e.migration_id)
      UNION ALL
        SELECT
          update_id,
          record_time
        FROM `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
        WHERE `undefined.functions.in_time_window`(TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 28 HOUR), migration_id, TIMESTAMP_SUB(as_of_record_time, INTERVAL 4 HOUR), migration_id, c.record_time, c.migration_id)
    )

(SELECT
      MAX(events_per_minute) / 60.0
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COUNT(*) as events_per_minute
      FROM `undefined.functions.one_day_updates`(as_of_record_time, migration_id)
      GROUP BY TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(TIMESTAMP_MICROS(record_time), MINUTE)
    )
  )

CASE choice
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_BuyMemberTraffic' THEN -- Coin Burnt for Purchasing Traffic on the Synchronizer
        -- AmuletRules_BuyMemberTrafficResult
        PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([2], 'numeric'))) -- .amuletPaid
        + PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 5], 'numeric'))) -- .summary.holdingFees
        + PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 7], 'numeric'))) -- .summary.senderChangeFee
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_Transfer' THEN -- Amulet Burnt in Amulet Transfers
        -- TransferResult
        `undefined.functions.transferresult_fees`(result)
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_CreateTransferPreapproval' THEN
        PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([2], 'numeric'))) -- .amuletPaid
        + `undefined.functions.transferresult_fees`(JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1], 'record'))) -- .transferResult
      WHEN 'AmuletRules_CreateExternalPartySetupProposal' THEN
        PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([4], 'numeric'))) -- .amuletPaid
        + `undefined.functions.transferresult_fees`(JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([3], 'record'))) -- .transferResult
      WHEN 'TransferPreapproval_Renew' THEN
        PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([4], 'numeric'))) -- .amuletPaid
        + `undefined.functions.transferresult_fees`(JSON_QUERY(result, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1], 'record'))) -- .transferResult
      ELSE ERROR('Unknown choice for result_burn: ' || choice)
    END

-- Find the ACS as of given time and sum bignumerics at path in the payload.
    (SELECT
      COALESCE(SUM(PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(c.create_arguments,
        `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`(path, 'numeric')))), 0)
    FROM
      `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_creates` c
    WHERE
      NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT
        TRUE
      FROM
        `undefined.mock_da2_scan.scan_sv_1_update_history_exercises` e
      WHERE
        (e.migration_id < migration_id
          OR (e.migration_id = migration_id
            AND e.record_time <= UNIX_MICROS(as_of_record_time)))
        AND e.consuming
        AND e.template_id_module_name = module_name
        AND e.template_id_entity_name = entity_name
        AND e.contract_id = c.contract_id)
      AND c.template_id_module_name = module_name
      AND c.template_id_entity_name = entity_name
      AND `undefined.functions.up_to_time`(as_of_record_time, migration_id,
            c.record_time, c.migration_id))

metadata.startup-script:
#! /bin/bash

export DB_ADDR=undefined
export DB_PORT=5432

# Enable the VM to receive packets whose destinations do
# not match any running process local to the VM
echo 1 > /proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward

# Ask the Metadata server for the IP address of the VM nic0
# network interface:
md_url_prefix="http://169.254.169.254/computeMetadata/v1/instance"
vm_nic_ip="$(curl -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" $md_url_prefix/network-interfaces/0/ip)"

# Clear any existing iptables NAT table entries (all chains):
iptables -t nat -F

# Create a NAT table entry in the prerouting chain, matching
# any packets with destination database port, changing the destination
# IP address of the packet to the SQL instance IP address:
iptables -t nat -A PREROUTING \
     -p tcp --dport $DB_PORT \
     -j DNAT \
     --to-destination $DB_ADDR

# Create a NAT table entry in the postrouting chain, matching
# any packets with destination database port, changing the source IP
# address of the packet to the NAT VM's primary internal IPv4 address:
iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING \
     -p tcp --dport $DB_PORT \
     -j SNAT \
     --to-source $vm_nic_ip

# Save iptables configuration:
iptables-save

inputs.definitionBody:
-- .summary.holdingFees
    PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(tr_json, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 5], 'numeric')))
    -- .summary.senderChangeFee
    + PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(tr_json, `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 7], 'numeric')))
    + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(PARSE_BIGNUMERIC(JSON_VALUE(x, '$.numeric'))), 0)
      FROM
        UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(tr_json,
                  -- .summary.outputFees
                  `undefined.functions.daml_record_path`([1, 6], 'list'))) AS x)

`undefined.functions.sum_bignumeric_acs`(
      -- (Amulet) .amount.initialAmount
      [2, 0],
      'Splice.Amulet',
      'Amulet',
      as_of_record_time,
      migration_id)

`undefined.functions.sum_bignumeric_acs`(
      -- (UnclaimedReward) .amount
      [1],
      'Splice.Amulet',
      'UnclaimedReward',
      as_of_record_time,
      migration_id)
`undefined.functions.in_time_window`(NULL, NULL, up_to_record_time, up_to_migration_id, record_time, migration_id)
